introSection:
Mini Rock 'N' Roller Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster at Opryland USA in Nashville, Tennessee, USA. It operated from 1977 to 1997.

It was part of a package of 13 rides sold to Premier Parks.
fullText:
Mini Rock 'N' Roller Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster at Opryland USA in Nashville, Tennessee, USA. It operated from 1977 to 1997.

It was part of a package of 13 rides sold to Premier Parks.
